summary.zh: 修复 ChatGPT Plus/Pro（Codex OAuth）登录：浏览器授权流程可正常启动，不再在打开浏览器前失败。
summary.en: Fixes ChatGPT Plus/Pro (Codex OAuth) login so the browser authorization flow starts normally instead of failing before launch.

title.zh: 修复 Codex OAuth 登录无法打开浏览器
title.en: Fix Codex OAuth login failing before browser launch

summary.zh: 适配新的 OAuth 回调契约后，设置里的 ChatGPT Plus/Pro 登录会正常打开浏览器完成授权；临时登录会话状态也改为组件内管理。
summary.en: After adapting to the new OAuth callback contract, ChatGPT Plus/Pro login in Settings opens the browser for authorization as expected; temporary OAuth session state stays component-local.

details.zh: 此前登录会在打开浏览器前失败；现在浏览器授权流程可正常启动。
details.en: Login previously failed before the browser opened; the browser authorization flow now starts normally.

sources.title: fix(auth): adapt Codex OAuth callback contract
